_comment: The lockstep enforcement registry — DATA consumed by tools/model-lockstep-gate.mjs (round-27 P1-02). Each record is a model invariant asserted as REALIZED, paired with the EXACT public-entry adversarial-closure conformance check that proves the attack is refused. The gate does NOT infer adversariality from English tokens (round-27 P1-02: a positive check named '...never...' bypassed the old regex); it verifies, per record, that (a) the model still states the claim and (b) the named check exists and (conformance being green) passes. Add an enforcement realization => add a record here, or the exhaustiveness pass fails.

records.model_locus:
every downstream
layer takes the derived context, never raw fields.
records.conformance_check: C1/L1 a raw pinnedPrior alongside a branded context → INVALID(E-AUTHORITY) — the context is the SOLE root (never raw fields, M2; round-26 P0-01)

records.model_locus: immutable within the epoch
records.conformance_check: C1/L2 raw recoveryKeys/recoveryThreshold alongside a branded context → INVALID(E-AUTHORITY) — recovery is genesis-fixed, never injected from a call argument (F.5l; round-26 P0-02)

records.model_locus: the EXACT signature-verified
records.conformance_check: M3/D getter-TOCTOU on receipt facts cannot mint an EvidenceHandle whose facts ≠ the signed facts → INVALID (round-26 P0-03, L3 closed)

records.model_locus: the same snapshot binds `verifiedGenesisContext`
records.conformance_check: M2/D verifiedGenesisContext: a getter on the genesis (TOCTOU) cannot mint a context whose scope ≠ the verified genesis → null (round-26 D — snapshot once)

records.model_locus: totality includes malformed non-null on EVERY argument
records.conformance_check: round-26 L5 malformed non-null on trailing args: resolveCadence and verifyJson accept a null trailing arg and return structured (no host throw)

records.model_locus: threaded through the PUBLIC entry
records.conformance_check: round-26 P1-03/L4 resolveByDiscovery THREADS the consumer witness budget (maxWitnessOpMs) through the PUBLIC entry → a tight budget resource-limits the witness, no false served-list HIGH (F.9 ρ_v)

records.model_locus: authority graph crosses the ONE inert snapshot boundary
records.conformance_check: round-27 P0-02 a getter on a checkpoint body cannot sign one body and mint another → INVALID(E-MALFORMED) (the chain crosses the snapshot boundary)

records.model_locus: a budget exhausted on the FINAL awaited leaf
records.conformance_check: round-27 P1-01 a budget exhausted on the FINAL leaf → INDETERMINATE(resource_limit), never reported as pending

records.model_locus: BYTE-TRANSPARENT to canon
records.conformance_check: CANON-TRANSPARENT: admitDeep is byte-transparent to canon (never looser; byte-identical when accepted) — the input-boundary soundness linchpin

records.model_locus: the input-boundary grid
records.conformance_check: BOUNDARY-GRID: every exported verifier admits its input once (no TOCTOU re-read across the surface — coverage answered in CI, not from memory)

records.model_locus: differential FUZZ
records.conformance_check: CANON-TRANSPARENT FUZZ: 3000 random inputs (pollution names / non-enumerable / sparse / non-plain proto / deep) — admitDeep is never looser than canon and byte-identical when accepted

records.model_locus: closed at ONE control, not per resolver
records.conformance_check: R3 ONE-CONTROL: admitOpts deep-admits EVERY nested opts/config DATA value once, so a resolver NOT individually patched (verifyEpochTransition) reads its nested doc ≤1 and cannot be shown a second face — the whole nested-doc re-read class is closed at ONE boundary (round-31)

records.model_locus: R3 spans the NESTED input graph
records.conformance_check: R3 NESTED: a two-face NESTED genesis in a resolver opts/config graph → the output is a projection over the VERIFIED face, never the unsigned re-read (round-31 P0-01/02/03; admitOpts is shallow, nested untrusted docs are deep-admitted once)

records.model_locus: over the IN-MEMORY executed set
records.conformance_check: LOCKSTEP IN-PROCESS: a disabled registered check is CAUGHT in-process — the lockstep validation over the LIVE executed set flags any registered adversarial-closure check absent from THIS run (never a committed, forgeable manifest; round-30 P1-02)

records.model_locus: MONOTONIC elapsed-time clock
records.conformance_check: R4 MONOTONIC: the witness budget clock is a monotonic ELAPSED source (performance.now), non-decreasing across reads — a wall-clock/NTP rollback cannot rewind the deadline and disable the whole-op budget (round-30 P1-01; not a wall clock with a wrapper)

records.model_locus: every resolver admits its untrusted input ONCE
records.conformance_check: R3 RESOLVER: resolveKeys admits its genesis ONCE — a two-face Proxy (signed A to verify, tampered B to the reducer) emits keys for the VERIFIED face or errors, NEVER the re-read face

records.model_locus: machine SIGNATURE REGISTRY
records.conformance_check: FROM-CODE SIGNATURE REGISTRY: every consumer-surface export has a declared signature (real arity + a valid reachability fixture per position) — no surface export escapes the totality sweep, a new one fails until declared

records.model_locus: content-bound to its source
records.conformance_check: SOURCE-BOUND MANIFEST: the executed-check manifest carries the sha256 of conformance.mjs and index.mjs — the lockstep gate recomputes them and rejects a stale manifest (evidence content-bound to its source, not trusted by CI order)

records.model_locus: faculties are its own
records.conformance_check: R4 CLOCK-OWNED: a hostile __nowMs in public opts is DEAD (never read) — it cannot expand the witness budget or flip resource_limit into a served-list HIGH (round-29 P0-02; ρ_v belongs to the verifier)

records.model_locus: CONTROLLER with three stages
records.conformance_check: R3 NON-BYPASS: a stateful Proxy answering the descriptor one value and [[Get]] another → INVALID, not a false VALID — verify reads the SAME face canon/identity reads

records.model_locus: RETURNED id
records.conformance_check: R3 IDENTITY: verify emits id(x̂) bound to the admitted snapshot it verified — the transcript is addressed by the returned id, not by a re-read of the raw input

records.model_locus: AWAITS each verifier to settlement
records.conformance_check: BOUNDARY-GRID async-aware: a verifier that re-reads its input AFTER an await is OBSERVED as read-count 2 (the grid awaits settlement; a sync snapshot would miss it) — round-29 div1

records.model_locus: classified FROM the module exports
records.conformance_check: FROM-CODE PARTITION: every function export is classified surface|exempt (no silent drop — a new export fails until classified)

records.model_locus: hostile-fixture BATTERY (throwing-trap Proxy, revoked Proxy, throwing-index array-like) in any argument position
records.conformance_check: FROM-CODE TOTALITY (hostile BATTERY): every consumer-surface export returns structured, never a host throw, on EACH escape shape (throwing-trap Proxy, REVOKED Proxy, throwing-index array-like) in any argument position — the fixture is exhaustive, so a new non-total path fails HERE (round-51)

records.model_locus: ONLY an ABSENT budget selects the reference default
records.conformance_check: round-27 P2-01 invalid maxWitnessOpMs (0/-1/NaN/Infinity/fractional) is REFUSED (resource_limit), never expanded to the reference default

records.model_locus: the public evidence-order path is the SAME closed decode as the kernel
records.conformance_check: R32 order cross-kind: transparency-log wearing pow facts {substrate,position} → unproven (its coord is log_id/index)

records.model_locus: a `key-pinned` atom that lifts no Tier
records.conformance_check: R32 Horn≡projectTier: every identity×time cell — max Horn Tier == projectTier

records.model_locus: applies the SAME CLOSED TYPED ADT the kernel's
records.conformance_check: R33 P0-01 signed transparency-log receipt with an EXTRA facts field → INVALID (closed per-kind facts, kernel-aligned)

records.model_locus: the raw-re-read class is closed at this one residual
records.conformance_check: R33 P0-02 issuer_id two-face Proxy → INVALID; issuer_id read from the ADMITTED snapshot R, never a raw re-read

records.model_locus: SWEPT across every signed authority witness
records.conformance_check: R34 P0-02 a checkpoint witness with an unsigned EXTRA sig field → INVALID (closed { body, sig } — no checkpoint-id malleability)

records.model_locus: never strict Pub32
records.conformance_check: R34 P0-01 a genesis authority carrying a non-canonical Pub32 alias roots NO authority (strict Pub32 before keyId)

records.model_locus: the signer-admission class closed at ONE primitive
records.conformance_check: R35 P0-01 uniqueness sig.key_id ≠ issuer (admitSigner binds issuer===key_id===keyId(pub)) → NOT attested

records.model_locus: asserts the choke-point rejects EVERY sig-wrapper tampering class
records.conformance_check: R35 admitSigner gate: every sig-wrapper tampering on a genuine attestation → NOT attested; only the genuine wrapper passes

records.model_locus: the nested authority KEY-PAIR admission at ONE primitive
records.conformance_check: R36 P1-01 admitAuthorityKey rejects a contradictory { key_id of A, pub of B } pair (via transition destination) — usable only if key_id === keyId(pub)

records.model_locus: canonical wire at the crypto LEAF
records.conformance_check: R36 P1-02 edVerifyStrict REJECTS a non-canonical Sig64 alias (same 64 bytes, different wire) — canonical enforced at the crypto leaf

records.model_locus: R1 (admit the input) UNIFIED at every exported operation
records.conformance_check: R37 P0-01 key-log Merkle sibling [] (not a canonical hash) → not terminal, NO host throw

records.model_locus: R1 is uniform between input and output at every level
records.conformance_check: R37/R39 joinAssurance with an OUT-OF-DOMAIN operand → RETURNS the valid operand (⊥ contributes nothing, never synthesizes strength from garbage), never a throw

records.model_locus: R1/R3/R4 made uniform at the last three exported ops
records.conformance_check: R38 P1-01 (R1/R3) assuranceState on a two-face Proxy emits the ADMITTED (first) face, not a stronger re-read

records.model_locus: a caller resource scalar may only TIGHTEN
records.conformance_check: R38 P1-03 (R4) verifyJson maxInputBytes:Infinity → structured E-MALFORMED, never an expanded ceiling

records.model_locus: the door mirrors the INPUT door
records.conformance_check: R39 P1-02 (R1) capAssurance with a HOSTILE consumer ceiling → RETURNS ⊥ (fail-closed cap), never a host throw

records.model_locus: never coalesces to a default
records.conformance_check: R39 P1-01 (R4) refBudget:Infinity → E-MALFORMED (a refused budget FAILS CLOSED, never coalesces to the 256-node default)

records.model_locus: admission must happen at EVERY door
records.conformance_check: R40 P1-01 (R1) sync verify admits opts ONCE — verifyCore never re-reads the live opts Proxy (a two-face maxSupportedBytes trap fires 0×)

records.model_locus: a falsy value is not a missing one
records.conformance_check: R40 P1-02 (R1) every MALFORMED capAssurance ceiling (falsy scalar / non-record / array: false,0,"",NaN,[],1,"x",true) → ⊥ (projectTier NONE), never a preserved TOP

records.model_locus: means the admitted value is IMMUTABLE, not merely a copy
records.conformance_check: R41 P1-01 (R1) the admitted opts snapshot handed to a capability as `this` is FROZEN (inert) — a resolveRef cannot mutate policy (acceptConsumerOverride) to flip LIGHT→HIGH

records.model_locus: must fail CLOSED
records.conformance_check: R41 P1-02 (R1) resolveAuthority with a PRESENT falsy/scalar/array genesis → E-GENESIS (falsy ≠ absent), never a silent self-asserted

records.model_locus: must be deep-admitted
records.conformance_check: R42 P0-01 (R1/R3) resolveKeys DEEP-admits the key-log — a two-face entry (signed key B / unsigned key C) never authorizes C (structured error OR authorizes only B)

records.model_locus: The evidence/axiom boundary is a PROVENANCE gate
records.conformance_check: R42 P1-01 (R1) an unminted servedNoFork + acceptConsumerOverride does NOT reach HIGH (override_liftable:false), yet still ≠ corroborated (rc35-P0a)

records.model_locus: a defect CLASS is not closed by fixing its known instances
records.conformance_check: R43/R44 STRUCTURAL: every require*/allow*/acceptConsumerOverride security-policy boolean in index.mjs + reference-checker.mjs is REGISTERED (a new grant flag fails until admitted + adversarially probed)

records.model_locus: must never inject a policy the checker would refuse
records.conformance_check: R44 P0-01 verifyAuthorityBundle injects NO threshold DEFAULT — the adapter passes the consumer policy through (no `Number.isInteger(...) ? ... : 2` fallback that manufactures a quorum the sole-checker refuses)

records.model_locus: public adapter around a sound kernel is a TCB surface too
records.conformance_check: R44 P1-01 verifyAuthorityCheckpointChain rejects a PRESENT malformed authority selector (genesisAuthority:false / recoveryKeys:0) → E-MALFORMED, never silently overridden or coalesced to {}

records.model_locus: at a multi-argument boundary, capture the TRUSTED inputs before executing
records.conformance_check: R45 P0-01 (R1/R3) checkAuthorityProof ISOLATES the trusted config — a hostile package getter cannot inject witnesses/threshold into the config the verdict uses (config encoded BEFORE package; identical config_id + verdict)

records.model_locus: closed by a BEHAVIORAL from-entrypoint gate, not a source regex
records.conformance_check: R45 P1-01 verifyAuthorityBundle success is EXCLUSIVE to a Freshness judgment — a Genesis-only proof → INDETERMINATE authority_unresolved, never a public VALID

records.model_locus: the automaton reads its input as DATA, it never runs it
records.conformance_check: R46 checkAuthorityProof REDUCES the config side-effect-free — a config accessor getter is NEVER executed (the automaton reads DATA, never runs it; this SUPERSEDES the rev45 source-level admission order — no code runs at the boundary at all)

records.model_locus: The whole proof is now read ONCE
records.conformance_check: R46 (Theorem R — ρ_package) checkAuthorityProof reads the SIGNED package ONCE — a two-face term Proxy (a different term on re-read) yields the SAME verdict as the honest package (referencedIds and canon see the ONE admitted [[Get]] face; no split)

records.model_locus: the OBJECT-form sync verify path admits the trusted opts BEFORE the untrusted signed
records.conformance_check: R46 self-audit (Theorem R) verify admits the TRUSTED opts BEFORE the untrusted doc — a doc getter that drops requireAuthoritative cannot rewrite the consumer policy the verdict uses (INVALID stays INVALID; cross-argument order, sync path)

records.model_locus: the totality of every reduction door is enforced from the SOURCE export list
records.conformance_check: R46 self-audit (totality, from-code) — NO public verifier/resolver export SYNC-throws a host exception on a hostile Proxy in every arg position (the SOURCE list is the roster; closes the combineSubstrates gate-completeness gap)

records.model_locus: roster is now the RUNTIME MODULE NAMESPACE
records.conformance_check: R47 P1-03 (roster completeness — RUNTIME namespace) — EVERY function-typed export of the module (100, incl. re-exports + arrow-consts + the byte kernel checkAuthorityProofBytes) is TOTAL on a hostile Proxy UNLESS explicitly classified MAY-THROW (producer / byte-string primitive / verdict class / throw-by-contract); a source-regex miss (arrow-const, re-export, future callable) can no longer evade the gate

records.model_locus: IS the sound public boundary
records.conformance_check: R47 (rev69 structural) resolveCadenceBytes IS the sound bytes-in boundary (pure function of immutable byte-strings, order-independent by construction) and the object resolveCadence adapter faithfully delegates to it (identical verdict on the same data)
